headline: Albemarle (ALB) Stock After 184% One Year Surge Are Recent Gains Already Priced In
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Albemarle's share price still offers value after a strong run, or if most of the easy gains are already behind it. The stock last closed at US$170.42, with a 9.6% gain over the past week, a decline of 15.2% over the past month, and returns of 18.4% year to date and 184.5% over the past year. Over longer periods, the 3 year and 5 year figures sit at a decline of 21.8% and a gain of 14.5% respectively. Recent market attention has been shaped by ongoing...
